caption: A man with a tall, grey, textured wig and glasses sits in a recording studio, wearing a white dress shirt and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs of various sizes. To his right, a white board and other studio equipment are partially visible. On the left side of the scene, a circular logo containing a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST" is visible, and next to it is the text "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking slightly to his left with a neutral facial expression. There is very little movement between the frames, as he maintains his posture and gaze, creating a consistent scene of a podcast recording session.
